creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
And here's a patch for pl09 appeared a few days ago.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/mail/postfix/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.9
diff -u -r1.9 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/09/10 21:48:58	1.9
+++ Makefile	1999/12/15 06:17:27
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/postfix/Makefile,v 1.9 1999/09/10 21:48:58 torstenb Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	postfix-19990906-pl02
-PKGNAME=	postfix-19990906.02
+DISTNAME=	postfix-19990906-pl09
+PKGNAME=	postfix-19990906.09
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.merit.edu/postfix/official/ \
 		ftp://ftp.snoopy.net/pub/mirrors/postfix/official/ \
Index: files/md5
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/mail/postfix/files/md5,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 md5
--- md5	1999/09/10 20:41:44	1.3
+++ md5	1999/12/15 06:17:34
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (postfix-19990906-pl02.tar.gz) = 7d712bc007bcb05728347cb6a3fbd2be
+MD5 (postfix-19990906-pl09.tar.gz) = f56882fa0a53b303f6f0d707aa73acf5

FUJISHIMA Satsuki
